name: partner-center-onboarding
description: Self-serve Microsoft Partner Center onboarding for ISVs and partners publishing to the Microsoft Marketplace. The entry skill (partner-center-guide) triages broadly -- account registration, tenant association, identity verification order, publish-path (declarative vs custom-engine agent, SaaS/VM offer types, listing/billing), and channel/tax (REO/MPO/CSP, Japan consumption tax/MoR) -- answering with symptom -> cause -> next action plus fetched Microsoft Learn links, four decision-flow images, and a JP tax cheatsheet. When account verification is the actual blocker it delegates to the internal specialist (troubleshoot-account-verification), which converges identity/roles, legal-entity & publisher identity, business-existence, and process-visibility into one verified, publish-ready account state and emits verification-ledger.json. Portable Agent Skills (SKILL.md) usable in GitHub Copilot CLI and packageable for Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork.
